arts.ttl: Real Madrid XI vs Getafe – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Real Madrid make the short trip to Getafe tonight aiming to keep alive their La Liga title dream. The Spanish champions are seven points behind leaders Barcelona, ahead of this evening’s game in hand. After a shock home defeat to Valencia earlier this month, Carlo Ancelotti’s side have steadied with back-to-back narrow wins against Alaves […] The post Real Madrid XI vs Getafe – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Vinicius Jr makes big decision on Real Madrid future
arts.sum: Vinicius Jr. will remain a cornerstone of Real Madrid, with a contract extension set to be announced at the end of the season, according to Manu Carreño on Spain’s El Larguero (Cadena SER) . Vinicius’ potential departure had been a growing point of speculation in recent months, as Saudi clubs continue to lure global stars with massive contracts.

arts.ttl: Getafe vs Real Madrid, 2025 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid visit Getafe in yet another crucial LaLiga game where Los Blancos will need to earn the three points in order to stay alive in the race for the 2024-25 title. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Asencio, Tchouameni, Fran Garcia, Camavinga, Ceballos, Valverde, Bellingham, Rodrygo, Vinicius.

arts.ttl: “I’m fine at Liverpool” – Reds player says he’s aware of transfer interest, but not rushing to go
arts.sum: Liverpool’s Alexis Mac Allister has been linked with a move to Real Madrid in the summer window. Last Monday, Marca journalist José Félix Díaz stated the 26-year-old is a target for Real Madrid. A day later, Díaz said the Liverpool star is ahead of Real Sociedad’s Martín Zubimendi in Real Madrid’s list. TyC Sports journalist The post “I’m fine at Liverpool” – Reds player says he’s aware of transfer interest, but not rushing to go appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Vinicius Junior BOMB! Real Madrid star agrees contract after €1 BILLION Saudi offer
arts.sum: Vini Jr has turned down offers from the Saudi Pro League to remain at Real Madrid, Cadena SER confirmed, though the Spanish source does differ from Romano when it comes to the length of his new deal at the Bernabeu. Vinicius Junior has made a definitive decision over his Real Madrid future amid reports of a world-record transfer bid from the Saudi Pro League, Fabrizio Romano has revealed.

arts.ttl: Why Kylian Mbappe Isn't Playing for Real Madrid vs. Getafe
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé is still nursing an ankle injury and therefore did not travel with Real Madrid to Getafe.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Getafe: La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid will once again be without the injured Kylian Mbappé when they take on Getafe in La Liga.
